prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.3 kg; Height 181.9 cm; BMI 25.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 9.3%; 3 months ago 8.8%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 247mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 86.2kg; 9 months ago 84.9kg; 6 months ago 85.8kg; 3 months ago 83.1kg; current 85.3kg), Height (12 months ago 181.9cm; 9 months ago 181.9cm; 6 months ago 181.9cm; 3 months ago 181.9cm; current 181.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 91mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 90mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 171mg/g; 9 months ago 195mg/g; 6 months ago 198mg/g; 3 months ago 155mg/g; current 181mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 123mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.3g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.97 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
